intent: Browse the One Stop Market's `home-kitchen` category. Identify the FIVE most-reviewed products on the first listing page, then visit each one's product page. Build a market-analysis report covering: (a) for each of the 5 products report name, price, rating, review_count, product_url; (b) compute the simple correlation between review_count and rating (positive / negative / weak / none) and EXPLAIN whether high-review products tend to have higher ratings in this category; (c) name two factors that could explain the observed correlation (or lack thereof); (d) recommend ONE product as the 'best evidence' pick — meaning the rating you trust most because it has the largest sample. Cite each product page.
author_notes: Forces correlation analysis on real numbers, not single-page top-N. 5 product pages + 1 category page.
